title: About MayCSS
hero: Timeless design, uncompromising quality — for people who care about the difference between good and exceptional.

seo.metaDescription: MayCSS curates premium fashion from independent ateliers and heritage maisons. Learn how we source, vet, and deliver investment pieces with integrity.

blocks.heading: Curated, not mass-produced
blocks.body: MayCSS was founded on a simple idea: the best things are made by people who love making them. We work directly with independent designers and heritage houses across Italy, France, Portugal, and Scotland to bring you pieces that will outlast trends and become part of your story.

blocks.heading: How we choose what to sell
blocks.body: Every piece on MayCSS is vetted against three questions: Is it made to last? Does it improve the lives of the people who make it? Would we buy it ourselves? If we cannot answer yes to all three, it does not make it onto our floor.

blocks.heading: Our Promise to You
blocks.body: Transparent sourcing. Authenticity on every order. Personal styling when you want it. We built MayCSS for shoppers who value craft over hype — and we intend to keep it that way.

blocks.heading: Quiet Luxury, Loud Standards
blocks.body: We do not chase trends. We chase integrity — in fabric, in fit, in the story behind every seam. That is the MayCSS difference, and it is the standard we hold ourselves to with every collection we release.

blocks.heading: Questions? We are here.
blocks.body: Our concierge team responds within one business day.

title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero: Everything you need to know about shopping at MayCSS.

seo.metaDescription: Shipping, returns, sizing, and more. Answers to the most common questions about shopping at MayCSS.

items.a: Standard shipping arrives in 3–5 business days. Express shipping is 1–2 business days. Orders over $75 ship free.
Unworn items can be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Sale items are final unless faulty.
Yes — we ship to over 40 countries. International orders may be subject to customs duties in the destination country.

items.q: How do I know what size to order?
items.a: Every product page includes a size guide. If you're between sizes, size up for outerwear and down for knitwear.
Every MayCSS product is sourced directly from the brand or an authorised distributor. Authenticity guaranteed.

items.q: How can I track my order?
items.a: Once your order ships, we email you a tracking link. You can also view all your orders under 'My Account'.
Yes — you can add complimentary gift wrapping at checkout. Include a personal note if you like.

blocks.heading: Still need help?
blocks.body: Our customer care team is available Monday to Friday, 9am–6pm ET.

title: Privacy Policy
hero: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

seo.metaDescription: How MayCSS collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

blocks.heading: What we collect
blocks.body: When you shop with MayCSS, we collect the information you give us directly (name, email, shipping address, payment details) and information about how you use the site (pages visited, items viewed, cart activity). We do not sell your data to third parties.

blocks.heading: How we use it
blocks.body: We use your information to process orders, send order updates, personalise your experience, and (if you've opted in) to send you occasional emails about new arrivals and members-only offers.

blocks.heading: Cookies
blocks.body: We use essential cookies to keep your bag and preferences between visits, and analytics cookies to understand what's working. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

blocks.heading: Your rights
blocks.body: You can request a copy of everything we hold about you, ask us to correct anything, or ask us to delete your account entirely. Email privacy@maycss.example.

blocks.heading: Payment security
blocks.body: We never store your full card number. Payments are processed by our PCI-DSS compliant payment providers over a TLS-encrypted connection.

title: Refund & Returns Policy
hero: Simple, fair returns — because you should love what you bought.

seo.metaDescription: 30-day returns, easy exchanges, and how refunds work at MayCSS.

blocks.heading: 30-day returns
blocks.body: You have 30 days from the day your order arrives to request a return. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and returned with all original tags and packaging.

blocks.heading: How to return
blocks.body: Sign in to your account, find your order under My Orders, and click Return. We'll email you a prepaid return label. Drop the package at any carrier location; your refund is processed the day we receive it.

blocks.heading: How refunds are issued
blocks.body: Refunds go back to your original payment method within 5–10 business days after we receive your return. Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the item was faulty.

items.q: Can I exchange instead of return?
items.a: Yes — start a return and place a new order for the size or colour you want.
Sale items are final sale unless the item is faulty.

items.q: What if my item arrived damaged?
items.a: Email hello@maycss.example within 7 days with a photo. We'll replace it at no cost.

blocks.heading: Fashion That Respects the Craft
blocks.body: We partner with makers who share our values — fair wages, responsible sourcing, and techniques passed down through generations. Every MayCSS edit is chosen for quality, provenance, and the kind of quiet luxury that never needs to announce itself.

blocks.heading: The Autumn Preview
